scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,host,riders,news "npm run dev --workspace=shared" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/host" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/riders" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/news"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/riders && npm run build --workspace=apps/news && npm run build --workspace=apps/host
scripts.start: concurrently -n host,riders,news "npm run start --workspace=apps/host" "npm run start --workspace=apps/riders" "npm run start --workspace=apps/news"
